mapper.select: /* UserBudgetMapper.selectBudgetYearMonthList */ WITH TB_YEAR_MONTH AS ( SELECT CD.YEAR_MONTH ,#{userId} AS MEMBER_ID FROM DUMMY_DATE CD ) SELECT A.YEAR_MONTH AS yearMonth ,B.BI_SEQ AS biSeq ,FORMAT(B.BEAU_AMOUNT, 0) AS beauAmount ,FORMAT(B.EDU_AMOUNT, 0) AS eduAmount ,FORMAT(B.ETC_AMOUNT, 0) AS etcAmount ,FORMAT(B.EVENT_AMOUNT, 0) AS eventAmount ,FORMAT(B.FOOD_AMOUNT, 0) AS foodAmount ,FORMAT(B.HEAL_AMOUNT, 0) AS healAmount ,FORMAT(B.HOME_AMOUNT, 0) AS homeAmount ,FORMAT(B.TRAN_AMOUNT, 0) AS tranAmount FROM TB_YEAR_MONTH A LEFT JOIN TB_BUDGET_INFO B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID AND A.YEAR_MONTH = B.BI_YEAR_MONTH AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE LEFT(A.YEAR_MONTH, '4') = #{year} ORDER BY A.YEAR_MONTH

/* UserBudgetMapper.selectBudgetDtl */ SELECT BI_SEQ AS biSeq ,FORMAT(BEAU_AMOUNT, 0) AS beauAmount ,FORMAT(EDU_AMOUNT, 0) AS eduAmount ,FORMAT(ETC_AMOUNT, 0) AS etcAmount ,FORMAT(EVENT_AMOUNT, 0)AS eventAmount ,FORMAT(FOOD_AMOUNT, 0) AS foodAmount ,FORMAT(HEAL_AMOUNT, 0) AS healAmount ,FORMAT(HOME_AMOUNT, 0) AS homeAmount ,FORMAT(TRAN_AMOUNT, 0) AS tranAmount FROM TB_BUDGET_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND BI_SEQ = #{biSeq}
/* UserBudgetMapper.selectBudgetSeq */ SELECT IFNULL(MAX(BI_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_BUDGET_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: /* UserBudgetMapper.insertBudget */ INSERT INTO TB_BUDGET_INFO ( MEMBER_ID ,BI_SEQ ,BI_YEAR_MONTH ,BEAU_AMOUNT ,EDU_AMOUNT ,ETC_AMOUNT ,EVENT_AMOUNT ,FOOD_AMOUNT ,HEAL_AMOUNT ,HOME_AMOUNT ,TRAN_AMOUNT ,DEL_YN ,REG_ID ,REG_DT ,UPD_ID ,UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId} ,#{biSeq} ,#{biYearMonth} ,REPLACE(#{beauAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{eduAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{etcAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{eventAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{foodAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{healAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{homeAmount}, ',', '') ,REPLACE(#{tranAmount}, ',', '') ,'N' ,#{userId} ,now() ,#{userId} ,now() )
mapper.update: /* UserBudgetMapper.updateBudget */ UPDATE TB_BUDGET_INFO SET BEAU_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{beauAmount}, ',', '') ,EDU_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{eduAmount}, ',', '') ,ETC_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{etcAmount}, ',', '') ,EVENT_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{eventAmount}, ',', '') ,FOOD_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{foodAmount}, ',', '') ,HEAL_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{healAmount}, ',', '') ,HOME_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{homeAmount}, ',', '') ,TRAN_AMOUNT = REPLACE(#{tranAmount}, ',', '') ,UPD_ID = #{userId} ,UPD_DT = now() WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND BI_SEQ = #{biSeq}
mapper.select: /* UserBudgetMapper.selectPrevBudgetDtl */ SELECT BI_SEQ AS biSeq ,BEAU_AMOUNT AS beauAmount ,EDU_AMOUNT AS eduAmount ,ETC_AMOUNT AS etcAmount ,EVENT_AMOUNT AS eventAmount ,FOOD_AMOUNT AS foodAmount ,HEAL_AMOUNT AS healAmount ,HOME_AMOUNT AS homeAmount ,TRAN_AMOUNT AS tranAmount FROM TB_BUDGET_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND BI_YEAR_MONTH = #{prevYearMonth} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* UserBudgetMapper.selectCategoryList */ WITH TB_CATEGORY_BUDGET_INFO AS ( SELECT CD.CATEGORY_CODE ,CD.CATEGORY_NAME ,#{userId} AS MEMBER_ID ,#{yearMonth} AS BI_YEAR_MONTH FROM CATEGORY_CODE CD ) SELECT A.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,A.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName ,CASE WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'BEAU' THEN B.BEAU_AMOUNT WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'EDU' THEN B.EDU_AMOUNT WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'ETC' THEN B.ETC_AMOUNT WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'EVENT' THEN B.EVENT_AMOUNT WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'FOOD' THEN B.FOOD_AMOUNT WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'HEAL' THEN B.HEAL_AMOUNT WHEN A.CATEGORY_CODE = 'HOME' THEN B.HOME_AMOUNT ELSE B.TRAN_AMOUNT END AS budget ,SUM(C.AMOUNT) amount FROM TB_CATEGORY_BUDGET_INFO A LEFT JOIN TB_BUDGET_INFO B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID AND A.BI_YEAR_MONTH = B.BI_YEAR_MONTH AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO C ON A.MEMBER_ID = C.MEMBER_ID AND A.CATEGORY_CODE = C.CATEGORY_CODE AND DATE_FORMAT(C.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.CATEGORY_CODE ORDER BY A.CATEGORY_CODE

/* UserBudgetMapper.selectSubCategoryList */ SELECT CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode ,CI_SEQ AS ciSeq ,CI_NM AS ciNm ,DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDt FROM TB_CATEGORY_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND CATEGORY_CODE = #{categoryCode} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CI_SEQ
